title: ScenarioAction
description: Single Module 2 attack action consumed by Module 3. Formalizes the op/function_signature contract while preserving legacy function/action fields.

chain.description: Canonical source | destination | relay, or a project-specific chain label.

op.description: Controlled operation vocabulary for Module 3 semantic dispatch.

contract.description: ATG node_id when the action targets a contract.

function_signature.description: Raw Solidity signature from Module 2, e.g. process(bytes message).

function.description: Legacy function field; kept for backward compatibility.

action.description: Legacy relay-mode field, e.g. faithful, tamper, replay, delay.
